title: Saving-basics module (emergency-buffer concept; cited, expert-signed-off)
context: The Saving-basics module is part of the M2 core curriculum, building on the Budgeting-basics module. It explains saving fundamentals — including the emergency-buffer concept — in plain, non-judgmental language. The module must acknowledge structural barriers to saving (low wages, medical debt) without blaming or shaming learners, cite all claims to openly-licensed authoritative sources, and never recommend specific savings products, interest rates, or institutions. It is gated on the Budgeting module (task 007) being complete and a credentialed reviewer being engaged.
objective: Draft, cite, plain-language review, accessibility review, linter-clean, and credentialed-expert-sign-off the Saving-basics module covering saving fundamentals and the emergency-buffer concept, with structurally-honest framing that acknowledges barriers without shaming.
acceptanceCriteria: Covers saving fundamentals and the emergency-buffer concept with labeled illustrative examples; never recommends a specific savings amount, account type, product, or institution
Structurally honest: acknowledges that structural barriers (low wages, medical debt) affect saving capacity; never implies saving failure is a personal moral failing
All factual and numeric claims cited to vetted openly-licensed authoritative sources; numbers shown as labeled examples with currency shown neutrally
Linter-clean: no product/brand/affiliate/advice phrasing; no unflagged jurisdiction-specific terms; 'Educational information, not financial advice' framing and non-commercial redirect present
Readability at or below grade 8; plain-language review passed; WCAG 2.2 AA met; a11y review passed
MDX frontmatter conforms to the content JSON Schema: sources[], reviewer, reviewedVersion, signoffDate, jurisdiction='neutral', notAdviceFraming:true, license=CC-BY-4.0
Credentialed financial-educator sign-off recorded for the shipped version; strings externalized for i18n
output: A reviewed, signed-off Saving-basics module (content/lessons/saving-basics.mdx) with full provenance metadata, linter-clean, accessible, plain-language, and translation-ready.
